app.title: Kobelgarten
kobel.heading: Your Shelf
slot.plantPrompt: What would you like to plant?
slot.buyHint: Buy seeds and a pot in the shop to plant here.
zucht.heading: Breeding Station
zucht.cutHint: A cutting clones the genome (with drift and mutation rolls) but costs the mother plant some growth. She has to regrow afterwards.
zucht.cutEmpty: No plant has grown enough yet. Cuttings are possible from {percent}% growth.
zucht.crossHint: Pick two mature plants of compatible species. This yields 1 to 3 seeds.
zucht.crossEmpty: You need at least two mature plants to cross-breed.
zucht.inventoryEmpty: Nothing propagated yet. Take cuttings or cross-breed plants.
zucht.plantHint: Plant them in the burrow: an empty spot plus a pot from your inventory.
shop.heading: Shop
shop.shelfSlotDesc: Room for one more plant ({count} of {max} slots)
shop.sellEmpty: No plants to sell. Grow something in the burrow first!
shop.confirmBody: Sell {name} for {value} 🌰? This can't be undone.
item.seed.desc: Base genome of the species, with a bit of randomness
item.giesskanne-gross.desc: Waters all plants with one click
events.heading: Events
events.sunburn: 🔆 Sunburn on {plant}, heals on its own.
events.noTraps: No sticky traps, get them in the shop
talents.heading: Talents
talents.respecHint: Resets all talents and refunds the points.
talent.grosser-tank.desc: Watering fills +25% over the brim per rank
talent.auto-giessen.desc: Plants water themselves before they dry out
talent.geschultes-auge.desc: Shows the gene values of your plants
talent.sonderkunde.desc: Collector squirrels come knocking twice as often
lexikon.heading: Plant Lexicon
lexikon.hint: Breed every species in every variegation to fill the album.
character.heading: Who tends the burrow?
character.hint: Choose your squirrel. Each brings a small starting bonus. Looks are a matter of taste, the bonus stays.
squirrel.hasel.flavor: A shrewd redcoat with a nose for business.
squirrel.fips.bonus: 10% chance: a cutting costs no growth
squirrel.fips.flavor: A grey-furred one with a steady hand on the scissors, sometimes cutting with no harm at all.
squirrel.nuka.flavor: A black-furred one with a soft spot for rare patterns.
tutorial.welcome.title: Welcome to Kobelgarten! 🌿
tutorial.welcome.body: I'll show you step by step how the planting magic works. Tap “Next”.
tutorial.buy-seed.title: 1. Buy a seed 🛒
tutorial.buy-seed.body: Head to the shop and buy a Pothos seed (10 🌰).
tutorial.buy-pot.title: 2. Buy a pot 🪴
tutorial.buy-pot.body: Now add a pot too, the seed has to grow somewhere after all.
tutorial.plant.title: 3. Plant it 🌱
tutorial.plant.body: Back in the burrow: place the seed on an empty shelf spot.
tutorial.water.title: 4. Water 💧
tutorial.water.body: Plants get thirsty. Water your seedling so it grows.
tutorial.grow.title: 5. Let it grow ⏳
tutorial.grow.body: Time passes in real time, even while you're away. Watch your little plant sprout and grow.
tutorial.cutting.title: 6. Propagate ✂️
tutorial.cutting.body: Once your plant has grown to 50%, take a cutting at the breeding station. It costs a little growth, but with luck it brings a variegation!
tutorial.sell.title: 7. Sell 🌰
tutorial.sell.body: Now cash in the plant: in the shop's “Sell” tab you turn green into cold hazelnuts.
tutorial.done.title: All done! 🎉
tutorial.done.body: You know the core loop: buy → tend → grow → sell → propagate. Have fun in the burrow!
menu.heading: Menu
menu.slotEmpty: Empty slot, a new garden awaits here
menu.backupHint: Export your save as a file (backup or device change) and import it again elsewhere.
menu.deleteConfirmBody: Slot {n} will be permanently deleted. This can't be undone.
